limitations: Storage Box / external backup path not exercised in this local proof.
Universe seed re-import is a separate step after restore (see universe_reimport_cmd).
recovery_instruction: pg_restore -d <target_db> backups/local-proof/<dump>; or bash scripts/restore-database.sh when available.
universe_reimport_cmd: python3 -c "from scripts.lib.universe import load_canonical_universe; u=load_canonical_universe(); print(u.summary())"
